proof:
let g (n : ℕ) : ℕ := Nat.ofDigits 2 (Nat.digits 2 n).reverse
  have h_digits_2n : ∀ n > 0, Nat.digits 2 (2 * n) = 0 :: Nat.digits 2 n := by
    intro n hn; rw [Nat.digits_def' (by norm_num) (by omega), Nat.mul_mod_right, Nat.mul_div_right _ (by norm_num)]
  have h_digits_2n1 : ∀ n, Nat.digits 2 (2 * n + 1) = 1 :: Nat.digits 2 n := by
    intro n; rw [Nat.digits_def' (by norm_num) (by omega), show (2 * n + 1) % 2 = 1 by omega, show (2 * n + 1) / 2 = n by omega]
  have g_2n : ∀ n > 0, g (2 * n) = g n := by
    intro n hn; unfold g; rw [h_digits_2n n hn, List.reverse_cons, Nat.ofDigits_append]; simp [Nat.ofDigits]
  have g_2n1 : ∀ n, g (2 * n + 1) = g n + 2 ^ (Nat.digits 2 n).length := by
    intro n; unfold g; rw [h_digits_2n1 n, List.reverse_cons, Nat.ofDigits_append]; simp [Nat.ofDigits]
  have len_2n : ∀ n > 0, (Nat.digits 2 (2 * n)).length = (Nat.digits 2 n).length + 1 := by
    intro n hn; rw [h_digits_2n n hn]; simp
  have len_2n1 : ∀ n, (Nat.digits 2 (2 * n + 1)).length = (Nat.digits 2 n).length + 1 := by
    intro n; rw [h_digits_2n1 n]; simp
  have g_4n1 : ∀ n > 0, g (4 * n + 1) = 2 * g (2 * n + 1) - g n := by
    intro n hn
    rw [show 4 * n + 1 = 2 * (2 * n) + 1 by omega, g_2n1, g_2n n hn, g_2n1, len_2n n hn, Nat.pow_succ]
    omega
  have g_4n3 : ∀ n > 0, g (4 * n + 3) = 3 * g (2 * n + 1) - 2 * g n := by
    intro n hn
    rw [show 4 * n + 3 = 2 * (2 * n + 1) + 1 by omega, g_2n1, g_2n1 n, len_2n1 n, Nat.pow_succ]
    omega
  have h_fg : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = g n := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with
    | h n ih =>
      simp at hn
      if h1 : n = 1 then rw [h1, h₁, show g 1 = 1 by native_decide]
      else if h2 : n = 2 then rw [h2, h₃ 1 (by decide), h₁, show g 2 = 1 by native_decide]
      else if h3 : n = 3 then rw [h3, h₂, show g 3 = 3 by native_decide]
      else
        have n_pos : n > 0 := by omega
        if he : n % 2 = 0 then
          have h_lt : n / 2 < n := Nat.div_lt_self n_pos (by decide)
          rw [show n = 2 * (n / 2) by omega, h₃ (n / 2) (by omega), ih (n / 2) h_lt (by simp; omega), g_2n (n / 2) (by omega)]
        else if ho : n % 4 = 1 then
          have m_pos : n / 4 > 0 := by omega
          rw [show n = 4 * (n / 4) + 1 by omega, h₄ (n / 4) m_pos, g_4n1 (n / 4) m_pos]
          rw [ih (2 * (n / 4) + 1) (by omega) (by simp; omega), ih (n / 4) (by omega) (by simp; omega)]
        else
          have ho3 : n % 4 = 3 := by
            have h_odd : n % 2 = 1 := Nat.mod_two_ne_zero.mp (by omega)
            have : n % 4 < 4 := Nat.mod_lt n (by decide)
            revert h_odd ho this; omega
          have m_pos : n / 4 > 0 := by omega
          rw [show n = 4 * (n / 4) + 3 by omega, h₅ (n / 4) m_pos, g_4n3 (n / 4) m_pos]
          rw [ih (2 * (n / 4) + 1) (by omega) (by simp; omega), ih (n / 4) (by omega) (by simp; omega)]
  have h_count : (Finset.filter (fun n => g n = n) (Finset.Icc 1 1988)).card = 92 := by native_decide
  rw [Finset.filter_congr (fun n hn => (by rw [h_fg n hn] : f n = n ↔ g n = n)), h_count]
